title.en: China LLM API from Overseas (2026): DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM Setup
title.zh-CN: 海外如何接入中国大模型 API（2026 实操指南）

excerpt.en: How to call Chinese LLM APIs from outside China—official DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, and GLM endpoints, OpenAI-compatible setup, payment tips, and a 5-step POC checklist. Independent index.
excerpt.zh-CN: 海外团队接入 DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi、GLM 官方 API 或 OpenAI 兼容网关。含三条路径、代码示例、支付避坑与 5 步 POC 清单。独立索引，非厂商背书。

paragraphs.en: Overseas teams usually access Chinese LLMs via three paths: official APIs (fastest), self-hosted open weights (most control), or overseas MaaS gateways (simplest cross-border billing). DeepSeek and Qwen ship OpenAI-compatible endpoints—change base_url and API key in most SDKs. Before production, test streaming, tool calling, P95 latency, and real token cost. Swift Horse indexes public specs; pricing and SLAs are on vendor sites.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 海外团队接中国大模型，通常走三条路：官方 API（最快）、开源自托管（数据可控）、海外 MaaS 网关（支付省心）。DeepSeek 与 Qwen 都支持 OpenAI 兼容接口，多数情况只改 base_url 和 API Key。上线前务必自测流式、tool calling、P95 延迟与真实 token 账单。Swift Horse 提供公开规格索引，价格与 SLA 以厂商官网为准。

heading.en: You may be stuck on the path, not the model
heading.zh-CN: 你可能卡在的不是「选模型」，而是「选路径」

paragraphs.en: People searching "access Chinese LLM API overseas" usually need four answers: Can I register and pay from abroad? Do I rewrite my OpenAI SDK? What about latency and compliance? What is the POC sign-off checklist? Leaderboards say DeepSeek reasons well and Qwen handles Chinese—you likely know that. The friction is payment, the three lines of config, and what to test before launch.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 搜「海外接入中国大模型 API」的人，实际往往在问：能不能从海外注册付款？OpenAI SDK 要不要重写？延迟和合规会不会踩雷？POC 通过标准是什么？榜单告诉你 DeepSeek 推理强、Qwen 中文好——这些你大概知道了。真正卡住的是：钱怎么付、代码改哪三行、测试跑哪几项。

heading.en: Three access paths at a glance
heading.zh-CN: 三条接入路径：一张表讲清楚

paragraphs.en: Path A — Official API: best when you need speed and cloud access; watch regional billing limits. Path B — Self-host open weights: when data must stay in your VPC (finance, legal, regulated manufacturing). Path C — Overseas MaaS / OpenAI-compatible gateways: when registration or payment blocks you; expect +5–15% cost and review data terms. Decision flow: define workload → pick path → run the 5-step POC below.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 路径 A 官方 API：要快、能接云，注意区域与支付限制。路径 B 开源自托管：数据不能出境时用（金融、律所、强合规制造）。路径 C 海外 MaaS / 聚合网关：注册或支付卡住时的备选，通常贵 5～15%，要审数据条款。决策顺序：明确负载 → 选路径 → 跑下文 5 步 POC。

heading.en: Path A: Official APIs (DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM, Kimi)
heading.zh-CN: 路径 A：官方 API（DeepSeek / Qwen / GLM / Kimi）

paragraphs.en: DeepSeek documents OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions at https://api.deepseek.com. Sign up at platform.deepseek.com; email registration often works internationally—confirm on the live site. Swap base_url and API key in the OpenAI Python or Node SDK; verify model names in official docs (aliases can deprecate).
paragraphs.zh-CN: DeepSeek 文档标明 OpenAI 兼容接口，base URL 为 https://api.deepseek.com。在 platform.deepseek.com 注册；海外常用邮箱注册，以官网当前流程为准。在 OpenAI Python/Node SDK 中替换 base_url 与 API Key；模型名以官方文档为准（旧别名可能下线）。

paragraphs.en: Qwen via Alibaba DashScope uses compatible-mode base URL https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1. International and domestic consoles may differ in model IDs and billing—copy names from your console, not blog posts. For agents, test function calling and streaming; do not assume 100% OpenAI parity.
paragraphs.zh-CN: Qwen 走阿里云 DashScope，兼容模式 base URL 常见为 https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1。国际站与国内站模型 ID、账单可能不同——从控制台复制模型名，别抄博客。做 Agent 先测 function calling 与流式，别假设与 OpenAI 完全一致。

heading.en: Path B: Self-host when data cannot leave your VPC
heading.zh-CN: 路径 B：开源自托管——数据必须留在自己 VPC 时

paragraphs.en: Several Chinese labs publish open weights or enterprise private deployment options (check each license). You own GPUs, quantization, monitoring, and scaling. Higher ops cost, clearest data path—fits teams with infra, not a two-person demo sprint.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 多家中国实验室提供开源权重或企业私有化选项（以各厂商 license 为准）。你要自己扛 GPU、量化、监控与扩缩容。成本高，但数据路径最清楚——适合有运维团队的 mid-size 团队，不适合「两个人先跑通 demo」。

heading.en: Path C: Overseas MaaS and aggregation gateways
heading.zh-CN: 路径 C：海外 MaaS / 聚合网关

paragraphs.en: If official signup or payment fails, OpenRouter, Together, or other OpenAI-compatible gateways are common fallbacks. Same pattern: unified endpoint, USD billing, multi-model routing. You pay for access convenience, not the lowest unit price. Production tip: primary on official API, MaaS as failover—do not single-source.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 官方注册或支付失败时，OpenRouter、Together 等 OpenAI 兼容网关是常见备选。模式相同：统一 endpoint、美元计费、多模型切换。你买的是接入便利性，不是最低单价。生产建议：官方 API 做主路径，MaaS 做 failover，别单吊一家。

heading.zh-CN: 账号与支付：海外团队常踩的 4 个坑

paragraphs.en: (1) Wrong platform URL—verify domains like platform.deepseek.com, not wrapper sites ranking in search. (2) Single payment method—if cards fail, some teams use Wise plus Alipay top-up per vendor Billing pages. (3) Stale model names—check deprecation notices in official docs. (4) No invoice entity—enterprise buyers need contracts early, not after POC.
paragraphs.zh-CN: （1）抄错平台 URL——核对 platform.deepseek.com 等官方域名，警惕搜索前排 wrapper 站。（2）只准备一种支付——信用卡失败时，部分团队用 Wise + 支付宝充值，以官网 Billing 为准。（3）模型名过期——对接官方文档 deprecation 说明。（4）没留发票主体——企业采购要尽早走商务通道，别 POC 通过后才开不了票。

heading.en: Scenario: 48-hour POC for a 10-person overseas SaaS team
heading.zh-CN: 场景案例：10 人 SaaS 团队的 48 小时 POC

paragraphs.en: English product, Chinese support pages, cost-sensitive users in US/EU. Day 1: register DeepSeek + DashScope trial keys; run 20 identical prompts each, log latency and output tokens. Day 2: 50 tool calls if agentic; rough monthly bill = (input×input rate + output×output rate) × daily volume × 30. Example outcome: DeepSeek for reasoning/code, Qwen for Chinese surfaces, MaaS key idle as failover—not a universal answer, a template.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 英文产品、中文客服页、用户在欧美、成本敏感。D1：注册 DeepSeek + DashScope 试用 Key；同一套 prompt 各跑 20 条，记延迟与 output token。D2：Agent 场景 50 次 tool call；粗算月账 = (input×输入价 + output×输出价) × 日调用 × 30。示例结果：DeepSeek 做推理/代码，Qwen 做中文页，MaaS Key 仅 failover——是模板，不是标准答案。

paragraphs.en: Connectivity (single 200 OK) → Streaming (stream=true meets UX) → Tool calling (≥50 calls, >95% success for agents) → P95 latency from your user regions, not localhost → Cost using real prompt lengths and input/output mix. Shortlist on Swift Horse comparison table and scenario match, then run this list before contracts.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 连通性（单条 200 OK）→ 流式（stream=true 满足产品）→ Tool calling（Agent 必测 ≥50 次、成功率 >95%）→ P95 延迟（从用户区域测，别只 localhost）→ 成本（用真实 prompt 长度算 input/output 比例）。在 Swift Horse 对比页与场景匹配缩小候选，签约前跑完本清单。

paragraphs.en: Read vendor data retention and training terms; redact sensitive payloads. Store API keys in env vars, never in git. Configure primary plus failover models with circuit breaking. Strip PII from logs; let legal own cross-border transfer decisions—not blog posts.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 读清厂商数据留存与训练条款；敏感 payload 先脱敏。API Key 放环境变量，别进 Git。配置主备模型与熔断。日志去掉 PII；跨境传输问法务，别问博客。

paragraphs.en: Treating chat web demos as API sign-off; ignoring output-token spend in agents; skipping tool-call tests; single-vendor lock-in without failover; treating gateway SLAs as vendor SLAs.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 把聊天网页 demo 当 API 验收；Agent 场景忽略 output token 导致爆预算；未测 tool calling 就上线；锁死单一厂商无 failover；把第三方网关 SLA 当成厂商 SLA。

heading.zh-CN: 在 Swift Horse 上的下一步

paragraphs.en: Browse the model catalog → compare on the services page → refine with scenario matching → run this POC checklist → confirm pricing and terms on vendor sites before signing. Related guides: /en/articles/china-ai-llm-guide-2026, /en/articles/china-llm-api-pricing-2026, /en/articles/chinese-llms-global-guide-2026.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 浏览模型库 → 对比页横向比较 → 场景匹配缩小范围 → 用本文 checklist 跑 POC → 签约前回厂商官网核实价格与条款。延伸阅读：/zh-CN/articles/china-ai-llm-guide-2026、/zh-CN/articles/china-llm-api-pricing-2026、/zh-CN/articles/chinese-llms-global-guide-2026。

question.en: Do I need a Chinese phone number to access China LLM APIs from overseas?
question.zh-CN: 海外接入中国大模型 API 需要中国手机号吗？

answer.en: It depends on the vendor. DeepSeek often supports email signup; DashScope requires an Alibaba Cloud account; GLM and Kimi follow their open-platform policies. Walk through registration once before your POC.
answer.zh-CN: 视厂商而定。DeepSeek 常见为邮箱注册；DashScope 需阿里云账号；GLM/Kimi 以开放平台当前政策为准。POC 前先走一遍注册流程验证。

question.en: Can I use the OpenAI SDK with DeepSeek or Qwen?
question.zh-CN: 能用 OpenAI SDK 调用 DeepSeek 或 Qwen 吗？

answer.en: Yes. Set the vendor base_url and API key; match model names to official docs. DeepSeek: https://api.deepseek.com. Qwen DashScope compatible mode: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1.
answer.zh-CN: 可以。设置对应 base_url 与 API Key，模型名以官方文档为准。DeepSeek：https://api.deepseek.com。Qwen DashScope 兼容模式：https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1。

question.en: Does DeepSeek offer an overseas API node?
question.zh-CN: DeepSeek 有海外节点吗？

answer.en: Official DeepSeek API traffic is served from mainland China infrastructure. Evaluate latency and compliance yourself; strongly regulated workloads may need self-hosting or a reviewed MaaS data-processing agreement.
answer.zh-CN: 官方 DeepSeek API 流量走中国大陆基础设施。延迟与合规需自评；强监管负载可考虑自托管或审阅 MaaS 数据处理条款。

question.en: Official API vs OpenRouter—which should I pick?
question.zh-CN: 官方 API 和 OpenRouter 怎么选？

answer.en: Prefer official APIs for lowest latency and newest model revisions. Use MaaS when payment or signup blocks you, or as failover. Production stacks benefit from dual paths.
answer.zh-CN: 要低延迟与最新模型版本，优先官方 API；支付或注册受阻时可用 MaaS，或作 failover。生产环境建议主备双路径。

question.en: How does Swift Horse relate to vendor documentation?
question.zh-CN: Swift Horse 与厂商文档是什么关系？

answer.en: Swift Horse is an independent public-spec index to shortlist models. Pricing, rate limits, and SLAs remain on each vendor site—we do not imply endorsement or guaranteed SLAs.
answer.zh-CN: Swift Horse 是独立公开规格索引，帮你缩小候选；价格、限流与 SLA 以各厂商官网为准，不构成背书或 SLA 承诺。

title.en: China LLM Guide 2026: Top Chinese LLMs Compared (DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM)

excerpt.en: Compare top Chinese LLMs and China AI models in 2026—DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM by use case, pricing, and API access. POC checklist + overseas setup tips. Independent index.
excerpt.zh-CN: 独立梳理2026中国AI大模型格局：DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi、GLM按场景怎么选。含POC清单、价格对比维度、出海合规与7天落地步骤。公开规格，非厂商背书。

paragraphs.en: In 2026, Chinese LLMs are chosen by workload—not a single leaderboard winner. Map code/reasoning, Chinese/multilingual surfaces, ultra-long documents, or enterprise agents first; then validate cost, latency, and compliance. DeepSeek often leads on reasoning value, Qwen on Chinese and cloud integration, Kimi on very long context, GLM on stable tool calling.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 2026年国产大模型已从「追GPT」进入「按场景分工」。选型先看工作负载（代码/长文档/Agent/多语言），再看成本与合规；DeepSeek偏推理性价比，Qwen偏中文与生态，Kimi偏超长上下文，GLM偏企业Agent。文末附7天POC清单。

heading.en: What you really want when searching "China AI LLM"
heading.zh-CN: 你搜「中国AI大模型」真正想解决什么

paragraphs.en: Most searches hide one of four goals: ship an API integration, build an agent with reliable tool calls, process book-length documents, or satisfy data residency for overseas or regulated teams. Rankings rarely answer those directly.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 搜这个词的人，表面在看名单，实际通常在问：接API上线、做Agent、啃长材料，还是满足出海/合规。榜单最爱给「综合第一」，生产环境里综合第一往往等于没有第一——你的负载才是标尺。

paragraphs.en: Swift Horse indexes public specs so you can shortlist before running your own eval. Confirm pricing, rate limits, and regions on each vendor's official site.
paragraphs.zh-CN: Swift Horse 整理公开规格便于缩小候选；签约前请务必在厂商官网核实价格、限流与区域可用性。

heading.zh-CN: 2026格局一张表：主流厂商与适合谁

paragraphs.en: DeepSeek (R1/V3/V4 families) is widely cited for reasoning, coding, and token economics with open-weight options. Qwen3 Max anchors Chinese, multilingual, and Alibaba Cloud–native stacks. Kimi K2 targets ultra-long context for legal and research reading. GLM-5 and GLM-4.x emphasize enterprise agents and structured JSON. ERNIE, Doubao, Spark, and MiniMax matter when you are already tied to Baidu, ByteDance, iFLYTEK, or voice/multimodal products.
paragraphs.zh-CN: DeepSeek（R1/V3/V4）公开资料中常见卖点是推理、代码、开源与token成本。Qwen3 Max 主打中文、多语言与阿里云生态。Kimi K2 面向超长上下文（法律/学术/长文阅读）。GLM 系列强调企业Agent与结构化输出。文心、豆包、讯飞、MiniMax 等在你已绑定对应生态时仍有价值。

paragraphs.en: Third-party roundups (e.g. Check.AI, May 2026) place DeepSeek R1, Qwen3 Max, Kimi K2, and GLM-4.6 in the top tier for different axes—treat those figures as signals, not contracts.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 第三方横评（如 Check.AI 2026年5月）常把 DeepSeek R1、Qwen3 Max、Kimi K2、GLM 列入第一梯队，但分属不同维度——请当作信号，不是合同承诺。

heading.en: What to measure beyond public benchmarks
heading.zh-CN: Benchmark之外，生产环境更该看什么

paragraphs.en: HumanEval, SWE-bench, and AIME scores help you shortlist. Before production, run five checks: P95 latency, tool-call success rate (for agents), long-context needle retrieval, cost per completed task, and logging/residency fit.
paragraphs.zh-CN: HumanEval、SWE-bench、AIME 适合缩小候选。上线前建议自测五项：P95延迟、工具调用成功率（Agent必测）、长上下文needle测试、单位任务成本、日志与数据驻留是否符合要求。

paragraphs.en: Do not copy blog conclusions—run 50 fixed prompts from your product on each finalist.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 别直接抄文章结论——用你们产品里的50条固定prompt在各候选模型上跑一遍。

heading.zh-CN: 按场景选型：从负载出发，不从排名出发

paragraphs.en: Code and math-heavy pipelines: DeepSeek is often shortlisted for reasoning-per-dollar and open deployment paths. Chinese or Southeast Asian multilingual products: Qwen3 Max plus Alibaba tooling. Contracts or full books in one pass: Kimi K2's long-context positioning. Internal ERP/IT agents with JSON and tools: GLM series stability matters more than chat polish.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 代码/数学/推理流水线：DeepSeek 常因性价比与开源路径进入短名单。中文或多语言产品：Qwen3 Max 与阿里云栈。单份合同或整本书：Kimi K2 的长上下文是硬差异。对接ERP的内部Agent：GLM 的工具调用与JSON稳定性比聊天体验更重要。

paragraphs.en: Decision flow: define workload → pick two or three vendors → POC on latency/cost/tools → branch on compliance (self-host open weights vs official API vs overseas MaaS).
paragraphs.zh-CN: 决策路径：明确负载 → 筛2–3家 → POC测延迟/成本/工具 → 按合规分叉（开源自托管 / 官方API / 海外MaaS）。

heading.en: Three team patterns that work in practice

paragraphs.en: Ten-person overseas SaaS (English-first, cost-sensitive): primary DeepSeek API, Qwen for Chinese support pages; POC gates on cost per 1k chats and P95 under 2.5s; compliance via open weights or regional MaaS.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 10人出海SaaS（英文为主、成本敏感）：主力DeepSeek API，中文页用Qwen；POC看千次对话成本与P95<2.5s；合规走开源自托管或区域MaaS。

paragraphs.en: Domestic law firm (80–120 page contracts): Kimi for full-text Q&A, Qwen for bilingual email; POC on clause retrieval accuracy plus 50-question hallucination spot checks.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 国内律所（80–120页合同）：Kimi做全文问答，Qwen做双语邮件；POC看条款定位准确率+50题幻觉抽检。

paragraphs.en: Manufacturing agent on ERP: GLM for tools/JSON, DeepSeek for hard reasoning subtasks; POC requires >95% tool success and auditable logs.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 制造业ERP Agent：GLM负责工具链与JSON，DeepSeek做复杂推理子任务；POC要求工具成功率>95%且日志可审计。

heading.en: How to compare API pricing without surprises

paragraphs.en: Split input vs output tokens, check long-context surcharges, batch or off-peak discounts, and free-tier cliffs. Example snapshot from Check.AI (May 2026): DeepSeek R1 output about $2.19/M tokens vs Qwen3 Max output about $4.00/M—verify live vendor pages before budgeting.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 分开看输入/输出单价、长上下文加价、批处理/夜间折扣与免费额度陷阱。Check.AI 2026年5月示例：DeepSeek R1 输出约 $2.19/百万token，Qwen3 Max 输出约 $4.00/百万token——预算前请截图官网价目。

paragraphs.en: Path A: vendor official API (fastest integration; review data residency). Path B: self-host open weights (DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM smaller variants) for control. Path C: overseas MaaS (OpenRouter, Together, cloud regions)—often +5–15% cost, fewer cross-border surprises.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 路径A：官方API（接入快，需审数据条款）。路径B：开源自托管（DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM小参数等，数据可控）。路径C：海外MaaS（OpenRouter、Together、云区域节点），价格略高但跨境顾虑更少。

paragraphs.en: D1: write three prompt classes and pass/fail criteria. D2: pick two or three models by scenario. D3: run 50-case set; log latency and cost. D4: 100 tool calls if agentic. D5: long-doc needle test if applicable. D6: security/compliance review. D7: Go/No-Go memo with primary and failover model.
paragraphs.zh-CN: D1：写清3类核心prompt与成功标准。D2：按场景筛2–3个候选。D3：跑50条固定测试集，记延迟与成本。D4：Agent场景做100次工具调用压测。D5：长文档needle测试（如适用）。D6：合规/安全评审。D7：出Go/No-Go备忘录，定主备模型。

paragraphs.en: On Swift Horse: browse the model catalog, compare on the services page, refine with scenario matching, then draft prompts—link: swifthorseai.com.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 在 Swift Horse：浏览模型库 → 对比页横向比较 → 场景匹配缩小范围 → 提示词工具固化模板（swifthorseai.com）。

paragraphs.en: Choosing from leaderboard rank alone; treating a chat demo as agent sign-off; ignoring output-token spend; skipping needle tests on long-context models; treating third-party reviews as vendor SLAs; locking one vendor with no failover.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 只看榜单不做业务prompt测试；把聊天demo当Agent验收；忽略输出token导致月底爆预算；长上下文不做needle测试；把第三方横评当官方承诺；一次锁死厂商没有failover。

question.en: Which major China AI LLMs exist in 2026?
question.zh-CN: 2026中国有哪些主流AI大模型？

answer.en: DeepSeek, Qwen (Tongyi), Kimi (Moonshot), GLM (Zhipu), ERNIE, Doubao, Spark, MiniMax, and others. Swift Horse lists public specs for side-by-side discovery.
answer.zh-CN: 包括 DeepSeek、Qwen（通义）、Kimi（月之暗面）、GLM（智谱）、文心、豆包、讯飞、MiniMax 等。Swift Horse 模型库提供公开规格索引。

question.en: How do Chinese LLMs compare to ChatGPT?
question.zh-CN: 国产大模型和ChatGPT比怎么样？

answer.en: Chinese models often win on Mandarin quality, pricing, and long context for many workloads; global agent ecosystems and some English frontier tasks still favor leading closed models. POC on your prompts, not nationality.
answer.zh-CN: 中文、价格、长上下文不少场景已具优势；全球Agent生态与部分英文前沿任务闭源仍强。按你的负载POC，别按国籍选。

question.en: Which is best for coding?
question.zh-CN: 哪个最适合写代码？

title.en: China LLM API Pricing 2026: DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM Cost Comparison
title.zh-CN: 2026中国大模型API价格对比：DeepSeek/Qwen/Kimi/GLM成本指南

excerpt.en: Compare China LLM and Chinese LLM API pricing in 2026—input/output token rates, agent cost traps, and a worksheet for DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, and GLM. Public list prices only; verify on vendor sites.
excerpt.zh-CN: 2026年国产大模型API怎么比价格：输入/输出单价、Agent成本坑与DeepSeek/Qwen/Kimi/GLM对比维度。仅整理公开价目，签约以厂商官网为准。

paragraphs.en: China LLM API pricing in 2026 is driven by input vs output token rates, context surcharges, and tool-call volume—not headline benchmark scores. DeepSeek often leads on reasoning value per dollar; Qwen competes on Chinese workloads and cloud bundles; Kimi and GLM price for long context and enterprise agents. Swift Horse does not publish live prices—use this framework, then confirm on official billing pages before budgeting.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 2026年大模型API账单取决于输入/输出单价、长上下文加价与 tool call 次数，而非榜单分数。DeepSeek 常具推理性价比；Qwen 强中文与云生态；Kimi/GLM 面向长文档与企业 Agent。Swift Horse 不维护实时价目——用本文框架缩小范围，预算以厂商 Billing 为准。

heading.en: Why "cheapest China LLM API" is the wrong question

paragraphs.en: Teams searching chinese llm or china llm pricing usually mix chat volume, RAG, and agentic loops in one spreadsheet. Agents burn output tokens and multiply tool rounds— a model cheap on input can lose on total cost. Split workloads first: high-volume FAQ chat, long-document RAG, code/reasoning, or multi-step agents. Price each lane separately.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 搜「大模型 API 价格」的团队常把对话、RAG、Agent 混在一张表里。Agent 会放大 output token 与 tool 轮次——输入便宜不代表总账低。先拆负载：高并发 FAQ、长文档 RAG、代码推理、多步 Agent，分场景估价。

paragraphs.en: (1) Input vs output $/1M tokens—agents skew output-heavy. (2) Context tier surcharges above 32K/128K. (3) Cached prompt discounts if offered. (4) Batch/async API discounts for offline jobs. (5) Tool-call surcharges or hidden round-trip latency costs. (6) Currency and invoice entity (USD vs CNY, domestic vs international console). Copy numbers from vendor docs dated within the last 30 days.
paragraphs.zh-CN: （1）输入/输出每百万 token 单价——Agent 偏 output。（2）32K/128K 以上上下文加价。（3）缓存 prompt 折扣。（4）批处理/异步 API 折扣。（5）tool call 隐性成本。（6）币种与开票主体（美元/人民币、国内/国际站）。价目以厂商近 30 天文档为准。

heading.en: Vendor snapshot: what each line is optimized for
heading.zh-CN: 四家典型定位（非实时报价）

paragraphs.en: DeepSeek API (platform.deepseek.com): frequently shortlisted when reasoning and coding token economics matter; check chat vs reasoner model IDs and current promos. Qwen via DashScope: strong for Chinese/multilingual surfaces and Alibaba Cloud bundles—international vs CN consoles may differ. Kimi (Moonshot): long-context and document-heavy pipelines—validate per-token tiers at long windows. GLM (Zhipu): enterprise agents and stable function calling—confirm enterprise tiers separately from consumer chat.
paragraphs.zh-CN: DeepSeek：推理/代码场景常进短名单，注意 chat 与 reasoner 模型 ID 及促销。Qwen/DashScope：中文与阿里云生态，国际站与国内站价目可能不同。Kimi/月之暗面：长文档负载，核实超长上下文档位。GLM/智谱：企业 Agent 与 function calling，企业档与消费档分开查。

paragraphs.en: Define: daily requests × avg input tokens × input rate + daily requests × avg output tokens × output rate × 30. Add 20–40% buffer for agent tool loops. Example pattern (illustrative only): 50K daily chat turns with 800 in / 300 out favors value leaders; 2K daily agent runs with 2K in / 1.5K out and 3 tool rounds can invert the winner. Run your own prompts—Swift Horse comparison table helps pick finalists, not final cents.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 公式：日请求 × 平均 input × 输入价 + 日请求 × 平均 output × 输出价 × 30；Agent 加 20–40% buffer。示例（仅说明方法）：5 万次日对话（800 in/300 out）与 2 千次 Agent（2000 in/1500 out、3 轮 tool）赢家可能相反。用真实 prompt 自测；Swift Horse 对比页帮缩候选，不代替精确分。

heading.en: Overseas billing paths and price drift
heading.zh-CN: 海外付费路径与价格漂移

paragraphs.en: Official APIs vs MaaS gateways (OpenRouter, Together) trade unit price for USD billing and signup ease—gateways often add 5–15%. Prices change with model version bumps; subscribe to vendor changelog RSS or re-check before renewals. Pair this guide with /en/articles/access-china-llm-api-overseas for setup and payment pitfalls.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 官方 API 与 MaaS 网关（OpenRouter 等）用单价换美元结算与注册便利，网关常贵 5–15%。版本升级会调价；续费前复查价目。接入与支付细节见 /zh-CN/articles/access-china-llm-api-overseas。

heading.zh-CN: 在 Swift Horse 上的下一步

paragraphs.en: Compare specs on /en/services → scenario match → run a 48h POC from the overseas API guide → log real token counts → sign on vendor sites. Related: /en/articles/china-ai-llm-guide-2026, /en/articles/top-chinese-ai-models-2026.

question.en: How do I estimate agent API cost for a Chinese LLM?

title.en: Chinese LLMs Guide 2026: China LLM Landscape for Global Teams

excerpt.en: Plain-language guide to chinese llms and the china llm market for overseas product and engineering teams—vendors, API access, compliance questions, and links to DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM profiles.
excerpt.zh-CN: 面向海外团队的 chinese llms / china llm 入门：厂商地图、API 接入、合规要点与 DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi、GLM 索引链接。独立整理，非厂商背书。

paragraphs.en: Chinese LLMs (China LLM APIs and open-weight lines) are now default options for Mandarin quality, long context, and competitive token pricing—not niche experiments. Global teams use them for bilingual products, research, and cost-sensitive agents. Swift Horse (swifthorseai.com) is an independent open index: browse specs, compare on /en/services, and confirm contracts on vendor sites.

heading.en: Who searches "chinese llms" or "china llm"—and why
heading.zh-CN: 谁在搜 chinese llms / china llm

paragraphs.en: Typical intents: (1) discover vendors beyond ChatGPT/Claude, (2) compare API access from the US/EU, (3) validate whether Chinese models fit English-only stacks, (4) build a procurement shortlist. This guide answers discovery and navigation; technical setup lives in /en/articles/access-china-llm-api-overseas, selection depth in /en/articles/china-ai-llm-guide-2026.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 常见意图：（1）了解 ChatGPT/Claude 之外的厂商，（2）从欧美接 API，（3）英文栈是否可用，（4）采购短名单。本文解决「地图」；接入见 access-china-llm-api-overseas，深选见 china-ai-llm-guide-2026。

paragraphs.en: DeepSeek — reasoning/coding value, OpenAI-compatible API. Alibaba Qwen — Chinese/multilingual, DashScope cloud. Moonshot Kimi — ultra-long context documents. Zhipu GLM — enterprise agents, tool calling. Baidu ERNIE, ByteDance Doubao, iFlytek Spark, Tencent Hunyuan, Baichuan, MiniMax — scenario-specific strengths. Use /en/models filters rather than memorizing logos.
paragraphs.zh-CN: DeepSeek：推理/代码、OpenAI 兼容 API。阿里 Qwen：中文/多语言、DashScope。月之暗面 Kimi：超长文档。智谱 GLM：企业 Agent。另有文心、豆包、讯飞、混元、百川、MiniMax 等。用 /zh-CN/models 筛选，不必背 logo。

heading.en: API access patterns for overseas engineers
heading.zh-CN: 海外工程师常见接入模式

paragraphs.en: Three paths repeat in production: official vendor API (lowest friction when signup works), self-hosted open weights (data residency), overseas MaaS gateway (USD billing fallback). Most stacks only change base_url and API key for OpenAI-compatible lines—still test streaming, tools, and latency from user regions. Details: /en/articles/access-china-llm-api-overseas.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 三条路径：官方 API、开源自托管、海外 MaaS。OpenAI 兼容栈常只改 base_url 与 Key——仍要测流式、tool 与用户区延迟。详见 access-china-llm-api-overseas。

heading.en: Compliance questions to ask legal (not blogs)

paragraphs.en: Data residency, training opt-out, log retention, cross-border transfer, and industry regulations (finance/health) vary by vendor SKU and contract tier. Swift Horse summarizes public marketing specs—it is not legal advice. Run vendor DPIA templates alongside your /en/articles/china-ai-llm-guide-2026 POC results.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 数据驻留、训练 opt-out、日志留存、跨境传输与行业监管因 SKU/合同而异。Swift Horse 仅整理公开规格，非法律意见。结合 china-ai-llm-guide-2026 的 POC 与厂商 DPIA 模板。

title.en: China LLM Agent & Tool Calling Guide 2026: DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM

excerpt.en: Compare Chinese LLM tool calling and agent APIs in 2026—function formats, streaming, success rates, and a 50-call POC for DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, and GLM. For overseas production stacks.
excerpt.zh-CN: 2026年国产大模型 Agent 与 tool calling 对比：函数格式、流式、成功率与 50 次 POC 清单。面向海外生产环境。

paragraphs.en: Agent workloads on China LLM APIs fail more often on tool-call parity than on chat quality. Before picking DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, or GLM for production agents, test: schema support, parallel tools, streaming + tools, error payloads, and output-token cost per successful task. Swift Horse indexes public API labels—not OpenAI parity guarantees.
paragraphs.zh-CN: Agent 场景失败点多在 tool calling 兼容性而非对话质量。选 DeepSeek/Qwen/Kimi/GLM 前需测：schema、并行 tool、流式+tools、错误 payload、每次成功任务的 output 成本。Swift Horse 仅索引公开 API 标签，不保证与 OpenAI 完全一致。

heading.en: Why tool calling breaks across vendors
heading.zh-CN: 为什么各家 tool calling 表现不同

paragraphs.en: OpenAI-compatible endpoints from Chinese labs vary on JSON mode, strict schemas, tool_choice behavior, and whether streaming emits tool deltas. A model strong on chat may drop or malform calls on nested objects. Run identical 50-call suites on finalists—see /en/articles/access-china-llm-api-overseas for setup.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 中国实验室的 OpenAI 兼容接口在 JSON mode、strict schema、tool_choice、流式 tool delta 上差异大。聊天强的模型可能在嵌套对象上失败。对候选跑相同 50 次调用套件；接入见 access-china-llm-api-overseas。

paragraphs.en: DeepSeek: popular for reasoning agents; verify reasoner vs chat model IDs. Qwen/DashScope: strong ecosystem tools; check international console model names. GLM: often chosen for stable enterprise function calling. Kimi: test long-context + tools together if documents drive agent state. Confirm on official docs before contracts.
paragraphs.zh-CN: DeepSeek：推理 Agent 常见；区分 reasoner/chat 模型 ID。Qwen/DashScope：生态工具多；国际站模型名另查。GLM：企业 function calling 稳定。Kimi：长文档+tools 联测。签约前以官方文档为准。

paragraphs.en: Define 5 tool schemas → 10 prompts each → log success, latency, malformed JSON, retries → measure output tokens per success → compare monthly cost at real volume (/en/articles/china-llm-api-pricing-2026) → document failover model. Pass threshold: >95% success for your schemas, P95 latency within product budget.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 5 组 tool schema × 10 prompt → 记录成功、延迟、畸形 JSON、重试 → 统计每次成功 output token → 按真实量估算月成本（见 china-llm-api-pricing-2026）→ 文档化 failover。通过线：schema 成功率 >95%，P95 延迟满足产品预算。

paragraphs.zh-CN: 对比 /services → 矩阵 top-chinese-ai-models-2026 → API access-china-llm-api-overseas → Kimi vs GLM kimi-vs-glm-selection-guide-2026。

title.en: Kimi vs GLM 2026: Long Context vs Enterprise Agents (China LLM)

heading.en: When Kimi K2 tends to fit

title.en: China LLM Compliance for Overseas Teams 2026: Data & API Risk
title.zh-CN: 2026海外团队使用中国大模型合规指南：数据与API风险

excerpt.en: China LLM compliance checklist for US/EU teams—data residency, cross-border transfer, logging, training opt-out, and when to self-host Chinese open weights. Not legal advice; independent guide.
excerpt.zh-CN: 面向欧美团队的中国大模型合规清单：数据驻留、跨境传输、日志、训练 opt-out 与何时自托管开源权重。非法律意见，独立指南。

paragraphs.en: Overseas teams using Chinese LLM APIs must separate model quality from legal fit. Cloud APIs may process data in mainland infrastructure; self-hosted open weights shift control to your VPC. Swift Horse summarizes public marketing terms—legal review and vendor DPAs are mandatory for regulated workloads.

heading.zh-CN: 法务应问的 6 个问题

paragraphs.en: (1) Where is inference run? (2) Are prompts/logs retained or used for training? (3) Cross-border transfer basis? (4) Subprocessor list? (5) Industry rules (HIPAA/PCI)? (6) Incident notification SLAs? Answers vary by vendor SKU—not by blog rankings.

paragraphs.en: Redact PII before API calls; use private deployment or self-hosting (/en/articles/chinese-llm-self-hosting-guide-2026); route only non-sensitive workloads to public APIs; maintain failover to non-CN regions when required.

title.en: Self-Host Chinese LLMs 2026: Open Weights & Private China LLM Deploy
title.zh-CN: 2026中国大模型自托管指南：开源权重与私有化部署

excerpt.en: When to self-host Chinese LLM open weights vs cloud APIs—GPU sizing, licenses, DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM paths, and compliance benefits for overseas teams with data residency needs.
excerpt.zh-CN: 何时自托管国产开源权重而非云 API——GPU 规模、License、DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM 路径与海外团队数据驻留收益。

paragraphs.en: Self-hosting Chinese LLMs trades cloud convenience for data control. Several labs publish open or enterprise-private weights (check each license). You own GPUs, inference stack, monitoring, and upgrades. Best when compliance blocks public APIs—not when you need fastest time-to-demo.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 自托管用运维换数据可控。多家发布开源或企业私有化权重（以 license 为准）。您负责 GPU、推理栈、监控与升级。适合合规阻挡公有 API——不适合追求最快 demo。

heading.zh-CN: 云 API vs 自托管决策

paragraphs.en: Choose API (/en/articles/access-china-llm-api-overseas) when speed, latest models, and low ops matter. Choose self-host when prompts cannot leave VPC, air-gapped environments, or contract requires on-prem. Hybrid: sensitive paths self-hosted, general chat on API.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 要快、要新模型、少运维 → API（access-china-llm-api-overseas）。prompt 不能出 VPC/ air-gap/合同要求本地 → 自托管。混合：敏感自托管，通用对话 API。

paragraphs.en: License review → GPU/quantization plan → inference framework (vLLM/TGI/etc.) → security patches → eval harness same as cloud POC → document failover to vendor API if self-host fails.
paragraphs.zh-CN: License → GPU/量化 → 推理框架 → 安全补丁 → 与云 POC 相同评测 → 自托管失败时文档化 failover 到厂商 API。

paragraphs.en: Pair with /en/articles/china-llm-compliance-overseas-2026 and pricing comparison /en/articles/china-llm-api-pricing-2026 for TCO.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 配合 china-llm-compliance-overseas-2026 与 china-llm-api-pricing-2026 算 TCO。

question.en: Which Chinese LLMs can be self-hosted?
question.zh-CN: 哪些国产模型可自托管？

answer.en: DeepSeek, Qwen, and GLM families offer open-weight or private options depending on version—verify license and GPU requirements on vendor pages.
answer.zh-CN: DeepSeek、Qwen、GLM 等部分版本可开源或私有化——以厂商页 license 与 GPU 要求为准。

question.en: Is self-hosting cheaper than API?
question.zh-CN: 自托管比 API 便宜吗？

answer.en: Not always—factor GPU capex/opex, MLOps headcount, and utilization. Low volume often favors API.
answer.zh-CN: 不一定——算 GPU、MLOps 人力与利用率。低用量常 API 更省。

question.en: Can overseas teams self-host Chinese models?
question.zh-CN: 海外团队能自托管吗？

answer.en: Yes in your own infrastructure; export/license terms may apply to weights—legal review required.
answer.zh-CN: 可在自有基础设施部署；权重可能有出口/license 条款——需法务审查。

question.en: Where to compare cloud alternatives?
question.zh-CN: 云方案去哪对比？

answer.en: /en/articles/china-llm-api-pricing-2026 and /en/services comparison table.
answer.zh-CN: china-llm-api-pricing-2026 与 /services 对比表。

title.en: China LLM vs ChatGPT 2026: When to Use Chinese LLMs Instead of GPT
title.zh-CN: 2026中国大模型 vs ChatGPT：何时用国产LLM替代GPT

excerpt.en: China LLM vs ChatGPT for production in 2026—cost, Chinese-language quality, coding, latency, and compliance. Decision framework for overseas teams choosing DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM, or Kimi instead of OpenAI GPT.
excerpt.zh-CN: 2026生产环境 China LLM vs ChatGPT：成本、中文质量、编程、延迟与合规。海外团队在 DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM/Kimi 与 OpenAI GPT 之间的选型框架。

paragraphs.en: Chinese LLMs (China LLM / chinese llms) do not replace ChatGPT universally. They win on token cost, Chinese/English bilingual tasks, and coding value at scale. GPT-class models still win when you need max ecosystem plugins, Western enterprise contracts, or lowest integration risk. Decide by workload—not brand loyalty. Swift Horse indexes public Chinese models independently.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 国产大模型（China LLM）并不全面替代 ChatGPT。在 token 成本、中英双语与大规模编程上常更有优势；GPT 在生态插件、西方企业合同与集成风险上仍更稳。按负载选型，不要跟品牌站队。Swift Horse 独立索引公开中国模型。

heading.zh-CN: 国产模型通常更强的场景

paragraphs.en: High-volume batch inference and agent loops where output tokens dominate cost—see /en/articles/china-llm-api-pricing-2026. Chinese document QA, CN↔EN product copy, and coding assistants often favor DeepSeek/Qwen on public benchmarks. Long-context Chinese PDFs may favor Kimi-class lines—see /en/articles/kimi-vs-glm-selection-guide-2026.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 高用量批处理与 Agent 轮次（output 成本主导）——见 china-llm-api-pricing-2026。中文文档 QA、中英文案、编程助手公开榜单常偏向 DeepSeek/Qwen。超长中文 PDF 可看 Kimi——见 kimi-vs-glm-selection-guide-2026。

heading.en: Where ChatGPT / GPT APIs still win
heading.zh-CN: ChatGPT / GPT API 仍更合适的场景

paragraphs.en: Teams already deep in OpenAI Assistants, Azure OpenAI, or US/EU data-processing agreements. Products that need mature tool marketplaces, voice/realtime stacks, or vendor SLAs familiar to Western procurement. Hybrid is common: GPT for product UX, China LLM for cost-sensitive backends.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 已深度绑定 OpenAI Assistants、Azure OpenAI 或美欧数据处理协议的团队。需要成熟工具市场、语音/实时栈、或西方采购熟悉 SLA 的产品。常见混合：产品 UX 用 GPT，成本敏感后端用 China LLM。

paragraphs.en: Pick 20 prompts from production → run on GPT + DeepSeek + Qwen → score Chinese accuracy, English fluency, tool-call success, latency P95 → estimate monthly cost at real volume → check compliance path (/en/articles/china-llm-compliance-overseas-2026). Failover: keep a second vendor ready.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 取 20 条生产 prompt → 在 GPT + DeepSeek + Qwen 上跑 → 评中文准确、英文流畅、tool 成功率、P95 延迟 → 按真实量估月成本 → 查合规路径（china-llm-compliance-overseas-2026）。保留第二厂商作 failover。

heading.zh-CN: 在 Swift Horse 上的下一步

paragraphs.en: Model matrix /en/articles/top-chinese-ai-models-2026 → API access /en/articles/access-china-llm-api-overseas → DeepSeek quickstart /en/articles/deepseek-api-overseas-quickstart-2026 → Qwen quickstart /en/articles/qwen-api-overseas-quickstart-2026 → catalog /en/models.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 矩阵 top-chinese-ai-models-2026 → API access-china-llm-api-overseas → DeepSeek quickstart → Qwen quickstart → 模型库 /models。

question.en: Is DeepSeek better than ChatGPT?
question.zh-CN: DeepSeek 比 ChatGPT 更好吗？

answer.en: For many coding and cost-sensitive tasks, public results favor DeepSeek value—but ChatGPT may win on ecosystem and some English product UX. Run your own 20-prompt bake-off.
answer.zh-CN: 许多编程与成本敏感任务上，公开结果偏 DeepSeek 性价比——但生态与部分英文产品体验 ChatGPT 仍可能更好。用自有 20 条 prompt 对比。

question.en: Can Chinese LLMs replace OpenAI in production?
question.zh-CN: 国产大模型能在生产替代 OpenAI 吗？

answer.en: Yes for well-scoped workloads after POC, pricing, and compliance review. Hybrid stacks are common. Swift Horse does not guarantee OpenAI parity.
answer.zh-CN: 在明确负载经 POC、定价与合规审查后可以。混合栈常见。Swift Horse 不保证与 OpenAI 完全对等。

question.en: Which China LLM is closest to GPT-4 class?
question.zh-CN: 哪个国产模型最接近 GPT-4 档？

answer.en: No stable public ranking—DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM, and Kimi lead different axes. Use /en/articles/top-chinese-ai-models-2026 and live model pages.
answer.zh-CN: 无稳定公开排名——DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM/Kimi 各擅胜场。见 top-chinese-ai-models-2026 与模型详情页。

question.en: Is this official OpenAI or DeepSeek advice?
question.zh-CN: 这是 OpenAI 或 DeepSeek 官方建议吗？

answer.en: No—independent Swift Horse selection guide. Defer to vendor docs for contracts and specs.
answer.zh-CN: 否——Swift Horse 独立选型指南。合同与规格以厂商文档为准。

title.en: Qwen API Overseas Quickstart 2026: DashScope China LLM from Abroad
title.zh-CN: 2026 Qwen API 海外快速接入：从境外调用 DashScope 中国大模型

excerpt.en: Call Alibaba Qwen / DashScope China LLM APIs from overseas in 2026—console signup, model IDs, OpenAI-compatible base URL, billing tips, and a 10-minute first request. For global teams.
excerpt.zh-CN: 2026年从海外调用阿里 Qwen / DashScope：控制台注册、模型 ID、OpenAI 兼容 base URL、计费提示与 10 分钟首请求。面向全球团队。

paragraphs.en: Qwen (Tongyi) via DashScope is one of the most accessible China LLM APIs for overseas builders who already use OpenAI SDKs. Success depends on picking the correct international console, model name, and region endpoint—not copying China-mainland IDs blindly. Pair with pricing (/en/articles/china-llm-api-pricing-2026) and DeepSeek quickstart (/en/articles/deepseek-api-overseas-quickstart-2026) for dual-vendor failover.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 经 DashScope 的 Qwen（通义）是海外开发者最易接入的 China LLM 之一，尤其已用 OpenAI SDK 的团队。关键是选对国际站控制台、模型名与区域 endpoint——不要照搬国内站 ID。配合定价与 DeepSeek quickstart 做双厂商 failover。

paragraphs.en: Create an Alibaba Cloud / DashScope account allowed for your region → enable model access → create API key → set OpenAI-compatible base URL from official docs → call chat.completions with a current Qwen model ID → log latency and token usage. Confirm names on the live console—Swift Horse does not mirror private model catalogs.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 注册可用区域的阿里云/DashScope → 开通模型 → 创建 API key → 按官方文档设置 OpenAI 兼容 base URL → 用当前 Qwen 模型 ID 调 chat.completions → 记录延迟与 token。模型名以控制台为准——Swift Horse 不镜像私有目录。

paragraphs.en: Using mainland-only model IDs from blogs; wrong region endpoint; unpaid balance blocking inference; assuming tool-calling parity with OpenAI without testing—see /en/articles/china-llm-agent-tool-calling-2026. Keep a billing alert and a second vendor (DeepSeek/GLM) for outages.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 照抄仅国内可用的模型 ID；区域 endpoint 错误；欠费导致推理失败；未测试就假设 tool calling 与 OpenAI 一致——见 china-llm-agent-tool-calling-2026。设置账单告警，并备 DeepSeek/GLM 作第二厂商。

heading.en: When to pick Qwen vs DeepSeek

paragraphs.en: Qwen: strong Alibaba ecosystem, multimodal options, and enterprise China cloud paths. DeepSeek: often preferred for coding cost/performance in public suites. Run the same 20 prompts—see /en/articles/deepseek-vs-qwen-selection-guide and /en/articles/china-llm-vs-chatgpt-2026.
paragraphs.zh-CN: Qwen：阿里生态、多模态与企业云路径强。DeepSeek：公开评测中常在编程性价比占优。跑相同 20 条 prompt——见 deepseek-vs-qwen-selection-guide 与 china-llm-vs-chatgpt-2026。

heading.zh-CN: 在 Swift Horse 上的下一步

paragraphs.en: Qwen model pages /en/models → comparison /en/services → overseas access overview /en/articles/access-china-llm-api-overseas → coding guide /en/articles/china-llm-coding-assistant-2026.
paragraphs.zh-CN: Qwen 模型页 /models → 对比 /services → 海外接入总览 access-china-llm-api-overseas → 编程指南 china-llm-coding-assistant-2026。

answer.zh-CN: 无 universal 答案——按编程/双语/多模态需求对比。见 deepseek-vs-qwen-selection-guide。

answer.en: No—independent Swift Horse quickstart. Authoritative specs live on Alibaba Cloud / DashScope docs.

title.en: Best China LLM for Coding 2026: DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM Assistants
title.zh-CN: 2026最佳编程中国大模型：DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM 编程助手选型

excerpt.en: Pick a China LLM coding assistant in 2026—DeepSeek vs Qwen vs GLM for repo tasks, unit tests, agent tool calling, and API cost. Practical POC checklist for overseas engineering teams.
excerpt.zh-CN: 2026 编程助手选型：DeepSeek vs Qwen vs GLM——仓库任务、单测、Agent tool calling 与 API 成本。面向海外工程团队的 POC 清单。

paragraphs.en: For coding, Chinese LLMs often compete with ChatGPT on value: DeepSeek frequently leads public coding suites; Qwen is strong in multilingual repos and Alibaba-cloud stacks; GLM appears in enterprise IDE/agent pilots with stable function calling. Rank by your repo language mix, test harness, and output-token budget—not a single leaderboard screenshot.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 编程场景下，国产大模型常在性价比上与 ChatGPT 竞争：DeepSeek 公开编程评测常见领先；Qwen 适合多语言仓库与阿里云栈；GLM 常见于企业 IDE/Agent 试点且 function calling 稳。按语言组合、测试脚手架与 output 预算排序——不要只看一张榜单截图。

paragraphs.en: Inline completion and chat fix → prioritize low latency. Repo-wide refactor and test generation → prioritize long context + tool calling (/en/articles/china-llm-agent-tool-calling-2026). CI batch review → prioritize cost (/en/articles/china-llm-api-pricing-2026). Self-host open weights only when code cannot leave VPC (/en/articles/chinese-llm-self-hosting-guide-2026).
paragraphs.zh-CN: 行内补全与对话修 bug → 优先低延迟。全仓重构与单测生成 → 优先长上下文 + tool calling。CI 批量 review → 优先成本。代码不能出 VPC 才自托管开源权重。

paragraphs.en: DeepSeek: start here for coding POC from overseas—/en/articles/deepseek-api-overseas-quickstart-2026. Qwen: DashScope model IDs and multimodal helpers—/en/articles/qwen-api-overseas-quickstart-2026. GLM: enterprise agent + IDE integrations—compare with Kimi only if docs dominate context (/en/articles/kimi-vs-glm-selection-guide-2026).
paragraphs.zh-CN: DeepSeek：海外编程 POC 首选入口——deepseek-api-overseas-quickstart-2026。Qwen：DashScope 模型 ID 与多模态——qwen-api-overseas-quickstart-2026。GLM：企业 Agent/IDE——仅当文档上下文主导时再与 Kimi 比。

paragraphs.en: Freeze 15 tasks from your backlog (bugfix, test, refactor, explain) → same system prompt → measure pass@1, lint errors, tokens, P95 latency → try one agent path with tools → pick primary + failover → document model IDs in runbooks. Compare vs GPT if needed: /en/articles/china-llm-vs-chatgpt-2026.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 冻结 backlog 15 个任务（修 bug/写测/重构/解释）→ 同一 system prompt → 测 pass@1、lint、token、P95 → 再试一条带 tools 的 Agent 路径 → 选定主用 + failover → runbook 写清模型 ID。需与 GPT 对比见 china-llm-vs-chatgpt-2026。

heading.zh-CN: 在 Swift Horse 上的下一步

paragraphs.en: Catalog /en/models → table /en/services → selection /en/match → API overview /en/articles/access-china-llm-api-overseas → global index /en/articles/chinese-llms-global-guide-2026.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 模型库 /models → 表 /services → 选型 /match → API 总览 access-china-llm-api-overseas → 全球索引 chinese-llms-global-guide-2026。

question.zh-CN: 2026 编程最好的国产大模型是哪个？

answer.en: DeepSeek is a common first POC for coding value; Qwen and GLM win on other axes. Validate on your repos—Swift Horse does not publish a live coding rank.
answer.zh-CN: DeepSeek 常作编程性价比首轮 POC；Qwen/GLM 在其他轴更强。用自有仓库验证——Swift Horse 不发布实时编程排名。

answer.zh-CN: 可通过 API 做自建 IDE 助手；与 Copilot 体验对等取决于编辑器插件，不只看模型。

question.en: DeepSeek or Qwen for TypeScript backends?
question.zh-CN: TypeScript 后端选 DeepSeek 还是 Qwen？

answer.en: Run identical tasks on both; many teams start with DeepSeek then keep Qwen as failover. See /en/articles/deepseek-vs-qwen-selection-guide.
answer.zh-CN: 两边跑相同任务；多数团队先 DeepSeek，Qwen 作 failover。见 deepseek-vs-qwen-selection-guide。

question.en: How do agents change coding API cost?
question.zh-CN: Agent 如何改变编程 API 成本？

answer.en: Multi-step tool loops multiply output tokens. Budget with real traces—/en/articles/china-llm-api-pricing-2026 and /en/articles/china-llm-agent-tool-calling-2026.
answer.zh-CN: 多步 tool 循环放大 output。用真实 trace 预算——见定价与 Agent 指南。
